data.title: Trump Says Ukraine's Zelensky Is 'Not Ready For Peace' After Oval Office Spat: 'He Disrespected The United States Of America'
data.description: President Donald Trump voiced his discontent with Ukrainian President Zelenskyy following their meeting at the White House.

data.title: Trump To Host First-Ever White House Crypto Summit Next Friday: BTC Surges Past $85,000, DOGE Surges Over 10%
data.description: President Donald Trump is set to host the inaugural cryptocurrency summit at the White House next Friday. This event marks a significant step in his administration’s engagement with the crypto industry.

data.title: After FSD Rollout In China, Musk Says Rollout In Europe Delayed Owing To Lack Of Approvals
data.description: Elon Musk said on Friday that it is still awaiting regulatory clearance to roll out its FSD driver assistance technology in Europe.

data.title: Starlink Launches $80 Monthly Plan As It Targets Wider Customer Base
data.description: Starlink has introduced a new monthly plan in the U.S. in a bid to lower the cost of satellite internet access.

data.title: Tesla Owners Stay True To Their Cars, While GM Retains The Most Loyal Customers
data.description: General Motors consumers are most loyal to the manufacturer while Tesla vehicle owners are most loyal to the vehicle make.
